message:
feat(trace,raptorq): expand event structure algebra, add boundary/causality modules, and GF(256) field arithmetic

Trace subsystem:
- Implement event structure algebra with prime event structure operations,
  conflict inheritance, enabling conditions, and configuration enumeration
  for reasoning about concurrent program behavior (event_structure.rs)
- Add trace boundary detection for identifying entry/exit points in
  distributed traces (boundary.rs)
- Add causality analysis module for computing happens-before partial orders
  from vector clocks and trace events (causality.rs)
- Extend vector clock with merge and comparison operations (vclock.rs)
- Expand trace event types with additional metadata fields (event.rs)
- Extend GF(2) polynomial arithmetic with additional operations (gf2.rs)
- Update trace module exports and formatting

RaptorQ:
- Add GF(256) Galois field implementation for erasure coding symbol
  generation (gf256.rs)
- Update RaptorQ pipeline with improved symbol scheduling
- Fix RaptorQ test assertions for updated API

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
